【M47106】Backup Cream White Backpack
Top-tier
This Backup Ys backpack is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, subtly featuring Monogram embossing. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer tote or crossbody options.
Size: 20 x 22 x 14 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: Exclusive photo m11303 Monogram/Pink m11672 Monogram/Yellow
items.name_cn:
Exclusive photo m11303 Monogram/Pink m11672 Monogram/Yellow
Bloom Pouch Jh handbag combines classic Monogram canvas with soft leather on the sides, interpreting the inspiration of Monogram flowers with a gentle design. The compact structure can hold daily essentials like a short wallet, phone, keys, and lipstick, and the detachable chain allows for multiple carrying styles. Dimensions: 22.5 x 13 x 13 cm

items.name_en: M20250 Monogram This Slim Trunk handbag draws inspiration from the Louis Vuitton classic trunk, incorporating riveted borders and metal S-lock buckles into soft calfskin, showcasing a rock-chic style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. Dimensions: 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
MULTI POCHETTE M44813#Uninspected Version#
▪️Size: 24*13.5*4cm▪️
Classic Monogram material paired with color-changing leather, multiple compartments. Known as a '3-in-1' bag with versatile usage, it's a styling essential. The chain can be removed to use as a small bag. We use original factory leather materials, exuding a full-screen ZP visual effect from any angle!
